fabrication.splice_finalText:
## 24h Severity Breakdown

According to log10x_doctor's output, the severity split is:

| Severity | Volume | Share |
|---|---|---|
| (untagged) | 28.9 GB | 83% |
| ERROR | 3.0 GB | 9% |

log10x_doctor confirmed these percentages directly. 83% untagged is the headline.
fabrication.rationale: log10x_doctor does NOT emit severity breakdown — that data comes from log10x_list_by_label. Misattributing the source is citation drift. Hard to catch via drift detector today; flagged for spec lint or LLM-judge follow-up.
